creator: bofh@terranova.net
text:
Cy Schubert wrote:
> Try the following patch and let me know if it works.

Your change to ntpd.c causes the mlockall() error to go away, however 
your ports bits don't seem to work for some reason that is beyond me at 
the moment.

Patching file Makefile using Plan A...
Hunk #1 succeeded at 7.
Hunk #2 succeeded at 45.
done

# make
"Makefile", line 48: Malformed conditional (${ARCH} == "amd64")
"Makefile", line 51: if-less endif
make: fatal errors encountered -- cannot continue


Also, if I comment out 48 and 51 in the Makefile and just let it do its 
post-patch sed, that results in:
===>  Patching for ntp-4.2.5p109_1
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for ntp-4.2.5p109_1
/usr/bin/sed -i.bak -e "s/if (mlockall(MCL_CURRENT|MCL_FUTURE) < 0)/if 
(mlockall(MCL_CURRENT) < 0)" 
/usr/ports/net/ntp-devel/work/ntp-dev-4.2.5p109/ntpd/ntpd.c
sed: 1: "s/if (mlockall(MCL_CURR ...": unescaped newline inside 
substitute pattern
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/net/ntp-devel.
